title: calcitrapa diluta
intro: Calcitrapa diluta, also known as the Nasturtium Flower or Watercress, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The medicinal properties of Calcitrapa diluta include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Calcitrapa diluta can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, and infusions for topical and internal use, and is also used as a garnish in salads and as a natural food coloring.
